title: Marksman 2X 6 Bike Hanging Hooks Garden Tools Bicycle LADDERS SHED Garage Hanger Storage
features: Dual-Pack Design: Includes 2 sets of 6 heavy-duty bike hanging hooks, providing ample storage solutions for up to 6 bicycles or a combination of bikes and garden tools.
Sturdy Construction: Made from high-quality steel with a durable powder-coated finish, these hooks are designed to support heavy loads and resist rust and corrosion.
Versatile Storage: Ideal for organizing bicycles, garden tools, ladders, and other equipment in your shed, garage, or any storage space, maximizing your available space.
Easy Installation: Features pre-drilled holes and includes mounting hardware, making installation quick and straightforward on walls, ceilings, or other surfaces.
Space-Saving Solution: Helps declutter your space by keeping bikes and tools off the floor, creating a cleaner and more organized environment.
description: Product Description Organize your garage, shed, or storage space with the Marksman 2x 6 Bike Hanging Hooks, a versatile and efficient solution for managing bicycles and other equipment. Each pack includes 2 sets of 6 heavy-duty hooks, allowing you to store up to 6 bikes or a combination of bicycles and garden tools. Constructed from robust steel with a durable powder-coated finish, these hooks are built to handle heavy loads while resisting rust and corrosion, ensuring long-lasting performance. The versatile design is perfect for hanging bicycles, ladders, garden tools, and more, helping you make the most of your storage space. Installation is made easy with pre-drilled holes and included mounting hardware, allowing you to securely attach the hooks to walls, ceilings, or other surfaces. The rubber-coated hooks prevent scratching and damage, providing a safe and secure storage solution for your valuable equipment. Maximize your space and keep your area tidy with these practical bike hanging hooks from Marksman. Whether you’re organizing your home garage or setting up a tool shed, these hooks offer a reliable and space-saving storage solution. Legal Disclaimer 2PC 6" BICYCLE HOOKS 2 x 6" hooks. Plastic coating prevents scratches. Ideal for hanging bicycles, ladders and tools.
